description: Combined verdict from sd_substrate_minimap2 (Angle A, trusted) and sd_substrate_biser2 (Angle B, cross-check). Per-side concordance + candidate-level confidence. When angles disagree, minimap2 wins for the primary call but disagreement is preserved. Backward-compat mirrors into mechanism.schema.json (q4_sd_concordance, q4_mechanism_confidence) for STEP_04_assign_structural_class.py.
question: Q4

q4_sd_concordance_left.description: Per-side concordance for the LEFT breakpoint. Values: agree_nahr, agree_nhej, agree_nahr_weak, minimap2_stronger_nahr, disagree_biser2_missing, disagree_minimap2_missing, minimap2_only_nahr, minimap2_only_nhej, minimap2_only_weak, biser2_only_nahr, biser2_only_nhej, complex_flagged, no_data.

q4_sd_concordance_right.description: Per-side concordance for the RIGHT breakpoint. Same enum as left.

q4_sd_concordance_overall.description: Candidate-level verdict combining left + right. agree_nahr | agree_nhej | agree_nahr_weak | disagree | *_only | complex_flagged | mixed | no_data.

q4_sd_primary_call_source.description: Which angle drove the call. minimap2 wins when both present; biser2 only when Angle A is missing.

q4_sd_primary_call.description: Final NAHR/NHEJ call for this candidate.

q4_sd_concordance.description: Backward-compat mirror of q4_sd_concordance_overall for mechanism.schema.json consumers.

q4_sd_source_minimap2_block.description: Path to sd_substrate_minimap2.json that fed this verdict (null if Angle A not run).

q4_sd_source_biser2_block.description: Path to sd_substrate_biser2.json that fed this verdict (null if Angle B not run).
